## Charts

Four charts are saved to `reports/charts/` when the script is run:

1. **revenue_trend.png** — Stacked monthly revenue by product
2. **revenue_vs_profit.png** — Revenue vs gross profit trend lines
3. **product_revenue.png** — Annual revenue by product (bar chart)
4. **region_revenue.png** — Annual revenue by region (bar chart)
